extra.description: Carpeta para tareas Data Flow del pipeline medallion
Proyecto DI para pipeline medallion de trafico de datos

task_name: Run Bronze to Silver Trafico Datos

extra.description: Invoca la aplicacion OCI Data Flow que procesa Bronze a Silver para trafico de datos.

items.description: Rename an object in the given Object Storage namespace.
items.name: RenameObject

items.description: RestTask to creates a bucket in the given namespace with a bucket name and optional user-defined metadata. Avoid entering confidential information in bucket names.
items.name: CreateBucket

items.description: Deletes a bucket if the bucket is already empty. If the bucket is not empty, use DeleteObject first. In addition, you cannot delete a bucket that has a multipart upload in progress or a pre-authenticated request associated with that bucket.
items.name: DeleteBucket

items.description: Creates a request to copy an object within a region or to another region
items.name: CopyObject
